name: Defaults Manager
description: Owner-only Agent: curate the pre-install default Agents that NEW accounts are seeded with. A normal PRIVATE Agent — its functions are owner-only because it is private, and it stores the list in its own app-data. Point DEFAULTS_SOURCE_APP at this Agent's slug. Deploy PRIVATE.

list_defaults.description: List the current pre-install default Agents (the set new accounts are seeded with).

add_default.description: Add an Agent (by app id) to the pre-install defaults. Affects FUTURE signups only — existing users are never modified. The Agent should be public or unlisted (the platform re-validates installability at seed time).

app_id.description: The app id (uuid) of the Agent to add as a default

badge.description: Optional neutral provenance label shown on the seeded card (e.g. 'Starter'). Not a trust signal.

remove_default.description: Remove an Agent from the pre-install defaults by its app id. Stops FUTURE seeding; existing users who already have it keep it.

app_id.description: The app id (uuid) of the Agent to remove from defaults
